<?php namespace libphonenumber\Leniency; use libphonenumber\PhoneNumber; use libphonenumber\PhoneNumberMatcher; use libphonenumber\PhoneNumberUtil; class Valid extends AbstractLeniency { protected static $level = 2; /** * Phone numbers accepted are PhoneNumberUtil::isPossibleNumber() and PhoneNumberUtil::isValidNumber(). * Numbers written in national format must have their national-prefix present if it is usually written * for a number of this type. * * @param string $candidate * @return bool */ public static function verify(PhoneNumber $number, $candidate, PhoneNumberUtil $util) { if (!$util->isValidNumber($number) || !PhoneNumberMatcher::containsOnlyValidXChars($number, $candidate, $util)) { return false; } return PhoneNumberMatcher::isNationalPrefixPresentIfRequired($number, $util); } }
